title: TIME-DOMAIN ANALYSIS OF DISCRETE-TIME SYSTEMS
summary: This page explains limitations of MATLAB's conv command for infinite-duration signals and notes that only the initial valid portion of the convolution is correct when causal infinite sequences are truncated. It illustrates the idea with the zero-state response of a second-order difference equation, provides the system impulse response, MATLAB code using conv, and Figure 3.36 showing the full computed output.
